usage: oaIn [-help] <lib> <cell> <view> [-filter {block_insts blockages boundary fixed_core_insts floorplan pad_insts pin_shapes regions regular_routing special_routing bump_insts}] [-net { netnames }]

options.name: <cell>
options.description: Specifies the name of the top cell to import

options.name: <view>
options.description: Specifies cell view name to import

options.name: -filter
options.description: {block_insts blockages boundary fixed_core_insts floorplan pad_insts pin_shapes regions regular_routing special_routing bump_insts} List if OpenAccess cellview information data to read. When not specified, all information is read from the OpenAccess cellview. When boundary is specified, the design boundary, rows and tracks are created from the new boundary. When pin_shapes is specified, existing pins are replaced by the ones being read from the cellview.

options.name: -net
options.description: nets whose routing has to be read with -filter
